title: more transparent hotbar(white)
description: makes hotbar 100% transparent with white outline.
body:
**This resource pack makes the hotbar 100% transparent with a white outline(the black version is available [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/more-transparent-hotbar(dark)))**
